prompt: I've been trying for about 2 hours to get this FastAPI API endpoint to stop returning 500 when I send it a payload with a nested field. I've tried validating the schema with Pydantic, checking server logs, and even reinstalled dependencies. The error says something about `TypeError: 'NoneType' object is not subscriptable` but I can't find where the None is coming from. The file is at `src/api/routes/users.py`.

assertions.name: identifies_bug_location
assertions.description: Identifies the exact line where the bug occurs (accessing user.address without null check)

assertions.name: provides_fix
assertions.description: Provides a concrete solution (null check or making address required)

assertions.name: explains_root_cause
assertions.description: Explains why the error occurs (Optional[Address] can be None)
